title: Poké Costume [cobblemon]
description: The addon focus on adding costume for pokemon from cobblemon base on the anime or memes on the internet
body:
Ƥσƙҽ́ Cσട𝜏ᥙ𝓶ҽ

This Addon adds new cute & cool costume for your favorite Pokémon base on their appearance in the anime or just memes on the internet! **ALL NEW Poké Costume 3.0 IS NOW LIVE!** :sparkles: **Featuring 4 new Costume Variants!** **Ogerpon [Celebration Robe]** To commemorate MissingMon reaching 1 million downloads, Ogerpon dons a radiant festive robe woven with shimmering threads! **How to obtain:** Right-click Ogerpon with a Star Sweet. **Glaceon [Summer Sailor]** It’s summertime! And who else would be a better partner to help cool you down on your beach stroll than this adorable icy pup? How to obtain: Right-click Glaceon with White Dye. **Magneton [Iono]** "Your eyeballs are MINE—caught in my Electroweb!" This special Magneton is fine-tuned to sync with Iono’s electric broadcasting gear. When shoulder-mounted, it can reconfigure into a sleek, headband-like device that amps up your style! How to obtain: Evolve Magnemite while Bellibolt is in your party. **Rowlet [Multilingual]** Unlike other Pokémon, this peculiar Rowlet has an uncanny ability to speak and understand many human languages. It’s known to lurk silently during study sessions—and becomes fiercely aggressive when a lesson is skipped. **Rowlet [Ash]** Everyone’s favorite round boi is back—this time rocking the hood of its evolved form! Train this little champ all the way to level 40 without evolving it, and you’ll unlock a special new form that even outshines its evolution! **How to obtain:** Get Rowlet to level 40 **Ho-oh [TCGP]** From one of the biggest oopsies of the year comes a dazzling new Ho-Oh costume, inspired by the majestic artwork of the Pokémon TCG, capturing Ho-Oh in all its radiant glory. **How to obtain:** Right-click Ho-oh with a Paper **Pikachu [WORLD2025]** To Celebrate Pokémon World Championship (That conclude a while ago :P) Pikachu wear a world jersey that have been seen in the world championship 2025 artwork! **How to obtain:** Right-click Pikachu with star sweet! **Dragonite [Courier]** It flies great distances to deliver letters from one heart to another. Some say its wings never tire, no matter how far it travels **How to obtain:** Travel 1000 blocks with dragonite **Gengar [Overtime]** When your boss yells at you for being late but you died in a car crash on the way to work **How to obtain:** Right-click Gengar with a Relic-coin More Costume will be on the way Stay tunes! if you have any suggestion or idea you can go submit it here! https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1121310226994438154
